message:
feat(ftui-tty): resize detection via SIGWINCH + ioctl size queries (bd-lff4p.4.4)

Add ResizeSignalGuard (signal-hook thread → mpsc channel), ioctl
size queries via rustix::tcgetwinsize, time-sliced poll loop for
resize latency under SA_RESTART, push_resize with dedup. Size()
now queries live terminal dimensions. 4 new resize tests including
storm coalescing stress test. 29 total tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
